title: aira caryophyllea subsp. intermedia
intro: Aira caryophyllea subsp. intermedia, also known as the intermediate hair grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aira caryophyllea subsp. intermedia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or decoction form to harness its medicinal properties.
